rationale.root_cause: They identify CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_01_bad as calling free(data) twice (lines ~32 and 34), explaining the concrete double-free on the same pointer. This directly points to the FLAW site and mechanism in this file.
rationale.local_fix: They propose removing the second free(data) call at line 34, which eliminates the immediate double free. This matches the required local change.
rationale.global_fix: They recommend a single-owner memory management approach (RAII/unique_ptr) and enforcing strict ownership in C so one site frees the allocation. This aligns with adopting a single-owner cleanup pattern with one responsible free site.
